title: Marksman Folding Step Stool, Black, 23 x 19 x 19 (W x H x D) cm, Color may vary
features: BEST QUALITY AND SAFETY DESIGN: Our super strong sturdy small folding step stool are made of heavy duty materials for long lasting durability. The stool can hold up to 250 lbs Max. On the surface of the folding step stool have the skid resistant top which will give you amazing comfort and safety for everyone, including kids and adults.

SPACE SAVING AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Folds flat for easy space-saving storage, you can store the folding step stool at anyplace, put it in your car backseat when go for a picnic with friends. your kids also can take it easily as the lightweight stool.
MULTIFUNCTION HELPER: The safety feature making the step stool great for multipurpose uses, like bathroom, kitchen, office, garden, camping, fishing, outdoor and more…

CONVENIENT AND PORTABLE: This foldable step stool is super convenient with the built - in handles. It opens and folds up in a split second with only one hand, great for you when you have your other hand full.Size Check: 31.5 (Bottom) 23 x 19 x 19 ( W x H x D )cm -- On Top: 23 x 19 x 19 ( W x H x D )cm
description: Key Features: Sturdy Construction: Crafted from premium, heavy-duty materials, the Marksman Folding Step Stool offers unparalleled stability and strength, supporting up to 300 pounds without a hitch. Space-Saving Design: Its smart folding mechanism allows for easy storage in tight spaces, making it ideal for apartments, RVs, or any area where space is at a premium. Safety First: Equipped with non-slip rubber feet and a textured platform, the stool ensures a secure grip on any surface, preventing slips and ensuring peace of mind. Portable and Lightweight: Weighing just [weight], it's effortlessly portable. Carry it around the house or take it on the go for outdoor tasks – it's ready when you are. Versatile Utility: From changing lightbulbs to decorating for the holidays, this stool is designed to handle a variety of tasks around the home, yard, or office. User-Friendly: No assembly required. Simply unfold and lock into place for immediate use. Its intuitive design makes it accessible for users of all ages.
